text: Stepping inside this sleek glass-walled space, I am struck by a sense of anticipation—a fusion of curious alertness and mild tension. The bright lighting and modern decor set a tone of innovation. As I gaze at the bold 'R+D' letters and the words about research and coexistence, I feel a part of something experimental, a living inquiry. The focus on responsiveness and evolution stirs hopeful, philosophical thoughts about humanity’s ever-changing relationship with technology. It is energizing, yet a touch unsettling, to stand in a place devoted to unraveling the new.
